title: α⁻¹ Bare Value from Pure Number Theory
description: Derived α⁻¹_bare = 360/φ² = 137.508 from pure number theory without any physics input, using only the Bost-Connes system and number field properties.

title: Four-Layer Arithmetic Structure of α
description: Revealed four-layer arithmetic structure: 360 = (d_K+1)/ζ_K(-3), connecting the geometric factor 360 to the discriminant and zeta function of ℚ(√5).

title: Charm Quark Blind Prediction Success
description: Blind prediction of charm quark mass using the quark-lepton formula deviated by only 0.74% from experimental value, providing strong validation.

title: φ as Bose-Einstein Fixed Point
description: Discovered that the golden ratio φ emerges as the fixed point of the Bose-Einstein distribution: n_BE(ln x) = x → x²-x-1=0 → x=φ, while 1/φ is the Fermi-Dirac fixed point.

title: Quark-Lepton Mass Formula from Primes
description: Established quark-lepton mass formula m ∝ p^a · (log p)^b where the six quarks map to the first six primes {2,3,5,7,11,13}, revealing deep arithmetic structure in particle masses.

title: Photon Membrane Model
description: Developed model of the photon as an expanding spherical membrane S²(t) with radius R(t)=ct, explaining photon propagation and wave-particle duality geometrically.

title: Three-Layer Structure of α Revealed
description: Decomposed the fine-structure constant into three multiplicative layers: geometric (volume ratios) × arithmetic (number theory) × gauge (coupling structure).

title: Electron Membrane Model
description: Proposed model of the electron as a spherical membrane wrapping the nucleus, with vibration modes corresponding to spherical harmonics Y_l^m, explaining atomic orbitals geometrically.

title: Arithmetic of Light
description: Discovered geometric origin of the fine-structure constant α from volume ratios of fundamental geometric objects, connecting physics to pure geometry.
